question: Find the true statement.
option1: An electron will not lose energy when jumping from the 1st orbit to the 3rd orbit
option2: An electron will not give energy when jumping from the 1st orbit to the 3rd orbit
option3: An electron will release energy when jumping from the 1st orbit to the 3rd orbit
option4: An electron will absorb energy when jumping from the 1st orbit to the 3rd orbit
remarks: Correct answer is "An electron will absorb energy when jumping from the 1st orbit to the 3rd orbit"

subject: Chemistry
skill: Atomic Emission and Atomic Absorption Spectrum
question: Which of the following is the principle of Atomic Absorption Spectroscopy?
option1: Radiation is absorbed by non-excited atoms in vapour state and are excited to higher states
option2: Medium absorbs radiation and transmitted radiation is measured
remarks: Correct answer is "Radiation is absorbed by non-excited atoms in vapour state and are excited to higher states"

question: How can the intensity of radiation be increased in Hollow cathode lamp?
